_comment_purpose: Config for markdown-link-check, consumed by .github/workflows/nightly.yml. ignorePatterns: regex list of URL prefixes the checker must not fetch (placeholders, internal-only hostnames, faucets that throttle CI). aliveStatusCodes: 403 + 429 are treated as 'alive' so a Cloudflare WAF or rate-limit bounce doesn't fail the build. Schema: https://github.com/tcort/markdown-link-check#config-file-format
